title: Associate/Staff - Quest Designer
description:
{"qualifications": "Sign in
Sign up
GAMES
CAREERS
NEWS
MERCH

COMMUNITY
 Back to Careers
Associate/Staff - Quest Designer

Obsidian is looking for a designer passionate about creating amazing worlds and gameplay experiences to join us in developing our next great multi-platform RPG. 

At Obsidian, Quest Designers build our core game experience. They invent the places and quests that fill our worlds and then build them with our tools in collaboration with the larger team to bring them to life in game. The ideal candidate is someone who loves RPG gaming, be that on the dining table, a monitor, or a video call. We’re looking for someone who can create fun, deep, engaging stories and adventures and adapt them on the fly to suit a player’s choices and needs.

This position requires the ability to work onsite or in a hybrid capacity at the Obsidian Entertainment office in Irvine, CA.

Responsibilities

Design and implement quest and area content in Unreal Engine and proprietary tools

Script quests with branching dialogues and player choices, setting up encounters, filling the world with details and lore, inventing new places with history, culture, and problems, populating our world and bringing it to life

Understand and internalize the game's creative vision to make awesome creative decisions

Work with other designers and the game’s directors to ensure content is part of a cohesive open-world experience

Requirements

Extensive experience as a game master and player for tabletop RPGs

Experience creating quests/missions on paper or digitally

A solid design sense, good communication and organization skills, and the ability to work with team members in a collaborative, goal-oriented way

Ability to receive and apply feedback iteratively on content

Pluses

Familiarity with Obsidian games

Video game development experience

Experience working with Unreal Engine

Experience in the writing and creating of tabletop games or supplemental materials for existing RPGs (such as modules)

Portfolio Requirements

Examples and demonstrations of game master experience. This could include any of the following: videos/streams of game mastering, maps, written modules or compendiums for D&D or other tabletop games

Includes videos, screenshots, and/or design documents

Obsidian Entertainment is proud to be an equal opportunity employer and we are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. 

The estimated base pay range for this role is:

$87,600 - $135,900 per year

Please, no phone calls or drop-ins. We only accept electronic applications.

APPLY NOW

title: Expert Level Designer
description:
{"salary_range": {"max": 520080, "min": 378000, "currency": "PLN"}, "qualifications": "Min. 7 years’ experience in level design with at least 1-2 years in an expert or leadership capacity.
Experience with game editors, Unreal Engine, and/or 3D packages.
Extensive knowledge of current titles, as well as works of art, such as movies, architecture or visual arts, to be used as reference for crafting and communicating original ideas.
Excellent understanding of level design fundamentals and the role of level design in the overall player experience.
Proactive problem-solving skills and an ability to effectively communicate solutions, as well as own and drive topics independently in a multi-disciplinary collaborative environment.
Ability to create map layouts on all stages – from simple drawings to fully functional levels in Unreal Engine.
Ability to use all elements of the game world, including level geometry, texturing, lighting, sound and VFX to craft unique player experiences.
Excellent communication skills & proven ability to work within a team.
Fluent English.", "responsibilities": "Designing, prototyping, iterating on and polishing in-game levels, including level geometry, enemy encounters and other gameplay elements, using our proprietary tools and Unreal Engine 5.
Crafting unique spaces where gameplay flow and visual composition form memorable experiences.
Developing and working within predefined level metrics.
Working closely with other teams to ensure created levels contribute to and enhance the gameplay and game narrative.
Cooperating closely with Designers, Artists and Programmers to ensure the highest possible quality of encounters.
Proactively suggesting improvements to gameplay systems and principles.", "technical_details": {"skills": ["Unreal Engine", "Excel"], "languages": ["English"], "minimum_years": 7}}
